mnemonics: V.L.A.D. the Android UI Builder: Views, Layouts, Attributes, Dimensions
keyPoints: Use XML to define the UI layout and structure
ViewGroups (like LinearLayout or ConstraintLayout) contain and arrange View objects
Always specify dimensions (dp, sp) and attributes (ID, text) for UI elements
commonMistakes: Using pixel (px) units instead of density-independent pixels (dp) for dimensions
Forgetting to assign unique android:id attributes for important Views
Creating overly nested View hierarchies which hurt performance
